pages.raw_text:
The leaders Of organised labor in
Spokane take strong exceptions to a
report published some time ago that
the city is suffering from dearth of
skilled workmen. The report IL char
acterized as an insinuation that
unionism. works detriment wherev-
er 1t exerts an influence, whereas,
everyone knows that it is impossible
for a man to be admitted toaits ranks
unless he is a competent hand at his
trade.


Not only are we not suffering
from dearth Of skilled labor" said
a member of the trades council last
night. but we have more labor of
such character In every craft than
we can find employment for"


This city is now thoroughly union
lied. which means that only help of
the most skilful kind can be en-
ployed.
